chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. S – 34 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 10.03.2025 Mr. Muhammad Qayyum Arain, Advocate for the petitioner Agha Ather Hussain Pathan, Assistant AG Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< Mr. Abdullah Brohi, Advocate files vakalatnama as well as objections to the petition on behalf of respondent No.4, same are taken on record. SIP Taj Muhammad IO of Crime No.30 of 2025 had stated that the F.I.R has been registered at Police Station, Market Larkana by respondent No.4, namely Ghulam Asghar under Section 365-B PPC regarding the abduction of his daughter and after investigation the interim challan has been filed before the concerned Court of Law. Counsel for the petitioners states that the petitioners will seek their remedy in accordance with the law. They may do so. The petition is disposed of accordingly. Judge ARBROHI
